# Pull Request

## Summary
<!-- One-line summary of the change -->

## Related issue
- Fixes / relates to: # (issue number)
- Milestone: Phase 1 / Phase 2 / Phase 3 / Phase 4

## What I changed
- Short bullet list of changes

## Why this is necessary
- Reason / user benefit

## Implementation notes
- DB migrations:
- New env vars:
- Third-party services / APIs:

## How to test
1. Steps to reproduce/test locally
2. Expected behavior / outputs

## Checklist
- [ ] Linked to an issue and milestone
- [ ] Size estimate added (size/S, size/M, size/L)
- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] CI passing
- [ ] Docs updated (if applicable)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if applicable)

## Privacy / PII checklist (required if handling user data)
- [ ] No PII logged in plain text
- [ ] PII at rest is encrypted
- [ ] Exports reviewed for intended recipients (PDF/print)
- [ ] Data access reviewed (least privilege)

## Security & QA
- [ ] Security review requested (if applicable)
- [ ] Accessibility considerations included (if UI changes)
- [ ] Performance implications evaluated

## Notes for reviewer
- Any special review instructions, edge cases, or manual verification steps
